title: Egyptian Chickpea Stew with Mellow Flavor
description: A hearty North African stew made with chickpeas, aromatic spices, and a hint of mellow flavor. Perfect for a comforting meal.

ingredients.name: mellow
ingredients.notes: chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley or cilantro

ingredients.name: tagine
ingredients.notes: a traditional North African stew pot

instructions: Heat oil in the tagine over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic; cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add chickpeas, cumin, and mellow; stir to combine.
Cover the tagine and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the flavors have melded together and the chickpeas are heated through, about 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional mellow if desired.
